summary: Tested new features: Optional clock toggle in Simple Football mode, Add Player to Roster feature, LoadingScreen component, and game creation for all sports. All features working correctly.

minor.issue: 404 errors in console for some resources (images/fonts) - does not affect functionality

issues: Console warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent - accessibility improvement needed

critical_code_review_comments: LoadingScreen component correctly implements dark gradient background with StatMoose logo and spinning circle
Clock toggle feature properly implemented with data-testid attributes for testing
Add Player to Roster feature works correctly with proper UI feedback (toast notifications)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features tested and working: 1) Simple Football clock toggle (X to hide, Enable Clock button to show), 2) Add Player to Roster when player # not found (shows prompt with name input, Add & Select button), 3) LoadingScreen with dark gradient and StatMoose branding, 4) Game creation works for Basketball, Football, and Baseball. Demo mode at /demo/football/simple is best for testing clock and add player features.

clock_toggle.details: Clock can be hidden with X button, Enable Clock button appears when hidden, clock re-enables correctly

add_player_to_roster.details: When entering non-existent player number (e.g., 45), shows 'Player Not Found' prompt with name input and 'Add & Select' button. Player is added to roster and selected for the current play.

loading_screen.details: LoadingScreen component has dark gradient background (from-zinc-900 via-black to-zinc-800), white StatMoose logo with moose antlers SVG, and spinning circle animation

game_creation_basketball.details: Successfully created basketball game, navigated to /game/{id}

game_creation_football.details: Successfully created football game with Simple mode, navigated to /football/{id}

game_creation_baseball.details: Successfully created baseball game, navigated to /baseball/{id}
